mnemonics: Pump up the string to 5 characters
Find a pair of adjacent characters
keyPoints: The Pumping Lemma states that every context-free language has a pumping length
The pumping length is the smallest length for which the following conditions hold
The language must contain a substring of length n+1
This substring can be divided into three parts
The first part must be non-empty,
The second part has a minimum length of 1, and
The third part must be a substring of the first part
